summary: data-science-pipelines is a Kubernetes component. managing 3 CRD(s): CompositeController, ControllerRevision, DecoratorController. deploying 11 workload(s) (squid, kubeflow-pipelines-profile-controller, ml-pipeline, ml-pipeline, ml-pipeline, cache-server, metadata-writer, ml-pipeline-persistenceagent, ml-pipeline-ui, ml-pipeline-scheduledworkflow, ml-pipeline-viewer-crd) with 11 container(s). exposing 2 service(s). protected by 1 network policy/policies. connecting to external services: grpc, minio, s3. exposing 50 Prometheus metrics. with 2 ingress route(s).
